overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a snowy mountain landscape. The character encounters a herd of wildlife including a large elk and mountain goats near snow-covered peaks before walking along a partially frozen river in a serene winter wilderness setting.

events.description: white mountain goats begin moving leftward across the field
large brown elk walks past close by on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward the wildlife herd in the mountain meadow

notable_agents.action: large brown elk with antlers standing alert in the snow
white mountain goats walking through the snow field

entered.detail: tall rocky mountain covered in snow dominating the background
dense cluster of snow-laden evergreen trees on the hillside
tall thin pine trees rising from the snow-covered ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy mountain meadow at dawn, approaching a herd of wildlife including a large brown elk and white mountain goats. Snow-covered peaks rise in the background while dense pine forests line the right side of the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field approaching river valley

events.description: last of the wildlife exits frame, leaving empty snowy landscape
river becomes visible in the distance ahead between the trees

agents.ego_description: continuing through the deep snow toward the distant river valley

entered.detail: dark waterway cutting through the snow-covered valley floor

segments.scene_description: After the wildlife departs, the character continues walking through the empty snow field as the mountain peak shifts to the right. A river becomes visible in the distance ahead, marking the transition toward the river valley.

events.description: character reaches the riverbank and begins walking alongside the flowing water
character turns slightly left to follow the curve of the river

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank following the water's edge through the snow-covered terrain

entered.detail: dark flowing water with snow-covered rocks protruding from the surface
large boulders capped with snow lining the riverbank
snow-covered fallen tree trunk lying near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the flowing river and walks along its snow-covered bank, navigating around rocks and a fallen log. The mountain peak now dominates the center background while the pine forest shifts to the left as the camera follows the river's winding path through the valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain meadow that gradually transitions into a riverside valley. It begins at dawn as the character approaches a herd of brown elk and white mountain goats set against a backdrop of towering peaks and dense pine forests. As the wildlife departs, the camera continues across the empty snow field, with the mountain peak shifting to the right while a distant river emerges on the horizon. The scene then opens into the river valley, where the character navigates along the flowing water's snow-covered bank, stepping around rocks and a fallen log. Finally, the camera follows the winding path of the river as the pine forest shifts to the left and the mountain peak comes to dominate the center of the background.
